homepage.title: AFRHEEC - Ukunika Amandla Emiphakathini
homepage.description: Thola ukuthi i-AFRHEEC inikeza kanjani amandla emiphakathini ngokugcinwa kwamagugu, imfundo, namaphrojekthi amasha.
homepage.sliderAlt1: Umphakathi ojabulayo ogubha ngaphansi kwesibhakabhaka esivulekile
homepage.sliderAlt2: Umcimbi wephrojekthi ye-AFRHEEC okhombisa ababambiqhaza abajabulayo

services.heritageText: I-AFRHEEC, Umphakathi Wezemfundo Nokugqugquzelwa Kwamagugu Ase-Afrika, uzinikele ekucwaningeni umlando ocebile namasiko ase-Afrika kanye nomthelela wawo ekuphileni kwabantu abamnyama baseMelika.
services.heritageText2: Ngokucwaninga uhambo lwabantu base-Afrika abaphathwa kabi futhi banyanzelwa ukuba abezwe baseMelika, i-AFRHEEC ihlose ukukhulisa ukuqonda okujulile kwezinselelo nezimpumelelo umphakathi wabantu abamnyama obhekene nazo namuhla.
services.heritageText3: Ngemizamo egxile ekulandeleni imvelaphi yabokhokho, ukubuyisela amasiko esintu, ukwakha imiphakathi eqinile, nokufuna ubunikazi beqiniso, i-AFRHEEC inikeza abantu amandla okuhlangana namagugu abo ase-Afrika futhi babhekane nobunzima bomphakathi wesimanje.
services.communityText: I-AFRHEEC ibona indima ebalulekile yomphakathi emasikweni ase-Afrika. Silwela ukwakha imiphakathi eqinile, esekelayo yabantu abamnyama lapho izingane zingakhula endaweni ephephile nenokusekelwa. Ngokudala izindawo ezingenakho ukwesaba nokucwasa, umgomo wethu wukuqinisekisa ukuthi abazali bangakhulisa izingane ezinokuzethemba nezibanzi. I-AFRHEEC izibophezele ekwakheni indawo yokuphephela ebamba umphakathi wabantu abamnyama emoyeni wobumbano nenhloso. Ngokuhlangenwe nakho, amasiko esintu, nokwesekwa okuvela kubantu abahlukene, sikholwa ekuvuseleleni omunye nomunye nasekukhuthazeni izizukulwane ezizayo.
services.currentProjectsText: I-AFRHEEC, Umphakathi Wezemfundo Nokugqugquzelwa Kwamagugu Ase-Afrika, uzinikele ekuphakamiseni umphakathi wabantu abamnyama ngemfundo, isiko, nokugqugquzelwa. Ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe mayelana namaphrojekthi ethu amanje nemizamo, okuhlanganisa nomsebenzi wethu wokusiza abaswele, chofoza uphawu olungezansi.

policyText.p1: I-AFRHEEC izibophezele ekusekeleni izinqubomgomo ezisekela ubulungisa, ukulingana, nokugqugquzela umphakathi wabantu abamnyama.
policyText.p2: Ukuze uthole ulwazi olwengeziwe mayelana nombono wethu ezindabeni ezibalulekile ezifana
policyText.andMore: nokunye, chofoza uphawu olungezansi ukuze ubone izinqubomgomo zethu nemizamo yethu yokumela umphakathi.
